name: com.jeminlee.metal-gpu-capture-skill
displayName: Metal GPU Capture Skill (Unity AI Assistant)
description: Unity AI Assistant skill package that drives macOS 27 'gpucapture'/'gpudebug' to capture a Metal GPU frame from a Unity macOS Standalone build (built on demand or attached to a running build), then interprets the .gputrace in Unity project context (SRP pass / shader / material / profiler markers) and surfaces performance-optimization insights.
